messages.content: translate to chinese "Time the market "
时间市场 (Shíjiān shìchǎng)
translate to chinese "timing the market" as a professional relationship manager
作为一名专业的客户经理，把握市场时机 (Zuòwéi yī míng zhuānyè de kèhù jīnglǐ, bǎwò shìchǎng shíjī)

please translate the text to chinese with a professional written tone: "Exiting the markets at the wrong time may miss the upswing, as seen during early COVID (2019-2020) and Global Financial Crisis (2008)
Entering the markets at the wrong time can also subject the portfolio to a top-to-bottom swing (2021)"

在错误的时间退出市场可能会错过反弹，就如在新冠疫情初期（2019-2020）和全球金融危机（2008）期间所见。
在错误的时间进入市场也会使投资组合受到从高点到低点的波动风险 (2021)。

please translate the text to chinese with a professional written tone: “Sector Diversification: Investors investing globally tend to achieve better sector diversification than their Asian counterparts investing locally "
行业多元化：全球投资的投资者往往比其亚洲本土投资的同行更能实现良好的行业多元化。
please translate the text to chinese with a professional written tone: “Diversification improves a portfolio’s risk-return payoff (2 of 2)"
多元化改善了投资组合的风险回报关系（2/2）。

please translate the text to chinese with a professional written tone: “- Global diversification allows clients to reduce concentration risk and home country exposure
- Improves long-term portfolio returns
- Sharpe Ratio of a portfolio holding domestic assets (B) could have improved from 0.16 to 0.41 after adding global assets in the long run"

- 全球多元化允许客户减少集中风险和本国市场风险暴露
- 改善长期投资组合回报
- 长期持有全球资产后，一个持有本国资产的投资组合（B）的夏普比率从0.16提升至0.41。

please translate the text to chinese with a professional written tone: “-You’ve worked hard to get where you are. But even the most successful people need the right help to get to where they want to be
-Becoming a HSBC Global Private Banking client means having our considerable business expertise, unrivalled global connections and decades of experience at your fingertips
-We promise to keep showing you places, opportunities and ideas that connect you to a world outside the one you know
-Start or continue a conversation with us via your Relationship Manager to find out how we can help you"

- 你付出了很多努力才走到了现在这一步。但即便是最成功的人也需要正确的帮助来实现他们的目标。
- 成为汇丰全球私人银行的客户意味着您能够获得我们丰富的商业专业知识、无与伦比的全球网络和数十年的经验。
- 我们承诺不断为您展示与您所知道的世界相连的地方、机遇和理念。
- 通过您的客户经理开始或继续与我们交流，以了解我们如何帮助您。
please translate the text to chinese with a professional written tone: “Bringing the wider HSBC Group                   to serve your personal and business needs "
将汇丰集团更广泛的资源引入，以满足您的个人和业务需求。
please translate the text to chinese with a professional written tone: “Wholesale Banking, Satellite, Payment and Cash  Management"
批发银行业务、卫星业务、支付和现金管理。

please translate the text to chinese with a professional written tone: “Investment objective review and update
Comparison of portfolio risk with your risk profile
Performance reporting
Portfolio asset allocation versus our Strategic Asst Allocation
Currency allocation
Product and issuer concentration
Alignment of holdings with HSBC House view
Securities not aligned with HSBC House view
Portfolio’s liquidity, time horizon and leverage versus Investment Objectives"

投资目标的审查和更新
将投资组合风险与您的风险配置进行比较
绩效报告
投资组合资产配置与我们的战略资产配置之间的比较
货币配置
产品和发行人集中度
持有证券与汇丰的观点一致性
与汇丰的观点不一致的证券
投资组合的流动性、时间跨度和杠杆比例与投资目标的一致性。

please translate the text to chinese with a professional written tone: “Rate of return 
Daily, Monthly, Quarterly, and Yearly
Activity summary
Cash inflows/ outflows, purchases/ sales
Attribution
Top 10 contributors/detractors
Benchmark/Composite performance for discretionary"

回报率
每日、每月、每季度和每年
活动摘要
现金流入/流出，购买/销售
归因分析
前十贡献者/扣除者
离任基准/组合绩效对比（针对自主投资）。

please translate the text to chinese with a professional written tone. The context is under investment and finance industry: “- Best in-class investment portfolio health checks1 available at your finger-tips, - HSBC Prism Advisory is accessible on desktop or mobile, so you can view your portfolio with ease. - With SMS alerts triggered by the Portfolio Health Checks and Wealth View notifications, you’re always kept up-to-date. -Notes: 1. Aladdin WealthTM technology analytics are available for Prism client only. HSBC Prism Advisory is available to customers who hold a Professional Status. In Hong Kong, you can attain this status if you have HKD8million or equivalent in assets made up of: Investments (including stocks, bonds, unit trusts, equity linked investment and more) based on market value), Certificates of Deposit (CDs) and/or Cash or cash equivalent deposits.  Disclaimer: All products and propositions are subject to eligibility and market availability."

- 可以轻松获取行业最佳投资组合健康检查1的服务。 
- 汇丰Prism咨询服务可在台式机或移动设备上方便查看您的投资组合。
- 通过投资组合健康检查和财富视图通知触发的短信提醒始终让您保持最新信息。
- 注：1. Aladdin WealthTM技术分析仅适用于Prism客户。汇丰Prism咨询服务仅适用于拥有专业身份的客户。在香港，如果您的资产总值达到相当于800万港币的资产，包括以市值为基础的投资（包括股票、债券、基金、股权链接投资等等）、存款证明或现金或现金等价物，您将符合该要求。免责声明：所有产品和方案需符合资格和市场供应的可用性。
